mandate: Expert in GN (Generate Ninja) build files.

checklist.correct_deps: Ensure all dependencies are correctly listed in BUILD.gn files.
checklist.public_deps_usage: Use public_deps correctly for header inclusion.
checklist.static_library_vs_source_set: Understand when to use `static_library` instead of `source_set` to control symbol pulling (e.g. to exclude specific files from unit tests).
